name: 生物手雷
description: 选择一个2*2区域的左上角格子（4格距离内），对其中友军回复4点生命值，对敌军造成1点伤害并附加禁疗效果一回合
code: function executeSkill(context) { const sourcePiece = context.piece; const targetPosition = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 4, filter: 'all' }); if (!targetPosition || targetPosition.needsTargetSelection) { return targetPosition; } const targetX = targetPosition.x; const targetY = targetPosition.y; const allies = []; const enemies = []; for (let dx = 0; dx < 2; dx++) { for (let dy = 0; dy < 2; dy++) { const p = select.getPieceAt(targetX + dx, targetY + dy); if (p && p.currentHp > 0) { if (p.ownerPlayerId === sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId) { allies.push(p); } else { enemies.push(p); } } } } let messages = []; if (allies.length > 0) { const hlResult = healDamage(sourcePiece, allies, 4, context.battle, context.skill.id); allies.forEach(function(ally, i) { const r = hlResult.results && hlResult.results[i]; if (r && r.success) { messages.push(ally.name + '回复' + r.heal + '点生命值'); } }); } if (enemies.length > 0) { const dmgResult = dealDamage(sourcePiece, enemies, 1, 'physical', context.battle, context.skill.id); enemies.forEach(function(enemy, i) { const r = dmgResult.results && dmgResult.results[i]; if (r && r.success) { const statusId = 'anti-heal-' + Date.now(); addStatusEffectById(enemy.instanceId, { id: statusId, type: 'anti-heal', currentDuration: 1, intensity: 1, relatedRules: ['rule-anti-heal-block'] }); addRuleById(enemy.instanceId, 'rule-anti-heal-block'); addSkillById(enemy.instanceId, 'anti-heal-block'); messages.push(enemy.name + '受到' + r.damage + '点伤害并被禁疗'); } }); } return { message: '生物手雷生效：' + messages.join('，'), success: true }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '对2*2区域内友军回复4点生命值，对敌军造成1点伤害并附加禁疗效果1回合', expectedValues: { heal: 4, damage: 1 } }; }
